title: ajuga × bastarda
intro: Ajuga × bastarda is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Ajuga reptans and Ajuga genevensis, commonly known as bugleweed or Ajuga. The medicinal properties of Ajuga × bastarda include its ability to act as an antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral agent, which helps to reduce anxiety, inflammation, and the severity of viral infections. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve cognitive function. Ajuga × bastarda can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
